## 🚀 Software Maintenance & Evolution PR Description

### 🛠️ Type of Maintenance Modification

- [ ] **Corrective:** Patching active runtime crashes or fixing regression bugs.
- [ ] **Perfective:** UI/UX refactoring, expanding features, or adding entirely new system modules.
- [ ] **Adaptive:** Upgrading external APIs, changing cloud structures, or configuring PWA environments.
- [ ] **Preventive:** Code refactoring, optimizing slow logic loops, removing code smells, or updating developer documentation to prevent future technical debt.

### 📝 Summary of Changes

A clear and concise summary of the new logic loops, asynchronous operations, or stylesheet alignments introduced in this branch.

### 🧪 Automated Quality Assurance & Verification

- [ ] All isolated unit tests pass successfully under `npm test`.
- [ ] Cypress automated End-to-End interactive browser specs execute cleanly.
- [ ] Mobile column stacking responsiveness verified on compact display widths.

### 👥 Assignment Contributor Declaration

- **Feature Owner/Reviewer:** [Your Name / Teammate Name]
